author: missirol
body:
This PR adds input files created using `CMSSW_16_1_0_pre3` for the unit test in `DataFormats/L1Scouting/test/TestL1ScoutingFormat.sh`, given the introduction of two new L1-Scouting data formats in that pre-release, i.e.
 - `l1ScoutingRun3::CaloTower` ([cms-sw/cmssw#48093](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/48093)) and
 - `l1ScoutingRun3::CaloJet` ([cms-sw/cmssw#50304](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50304)).

This PR is required by [cms-sw/cmssw#50424](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50424).

No backports of this PR will be needed.
title: add unit-test input files created with `CMSSW_16_1_0_pre3`
